# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.ScanTransformAdapter&lt;TState&gt;

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

Adapts an IScanTransform&lt;TState&gt; into an ITransform by managing state internally. The DataHandle returned by Apply() processes rows sequentially, maintaining state.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ScanTransformAdapter<TState> : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
